footer.tagline: Tournaments, news, and the billiards community — find games and partners near you.

devBanner.label: Beta

hero.title: Tournaments, news, and the
hero.body: Publish tournaments with interactive brackets, find a partner via Play a match, book tables in clubs — on the site and in the Telegram bot.

ticker.2: Play a match — player and club listings

news.title: News
news.lead: Announcements from billiard.guru and clubs in your region — tournaments, promos, platform updates.

tournaments.lead: Registration, interactive brackets, and results — on each tournament page.
tournaments.emptyDescription: Try another region or check back later.

players.title: Players
players.lead: Top players in your region — profile, rating, and tournament history.

announcements.title: Play a match
announcements.lead: Sparring, partners, and open tables — listings from players and clubs.

clubs.title: Clubs
clubs.lead: Photos, prices, table booking, and tournaments — club profile on billiard.guru.

news.emptyLead: News from {appName} and clubs in your region will appear here.

clubs.empty: Clubs will appear in your region soon.

players.empty: No verified players in this region yet.

announcements.emptyPlayerLead: Post a Play a match listing — sparring, a partner, or regular games in your city.
announcements.emptyClubLead: Clubs can post open tables and invites via Play a match.
announcements.footerAfter: — post a listing or respond to others. Available on the site and in the Telegram bot.

mission.title: Tournaments, local play, and tools for clubs
mission.body: is a platform for running tournaments, publishing news, and finding games in your city. Organizers manage brackets and scores; clubs handle bookings and listings; players use ratings and Play a match.
mission.telegram: Telegram bot @{bot}: tournaments, match alerts, club management, and the listings board — no app install required.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.desc: Publishing, registration, interactive brackets, and scores — singles and teams.

brackets.title: Bracket formats
brackets.desc: Single elimination, Swiss, and reference brackets for 16, 32, and 64 — with demos in the guide.

pokatat.title: Play a match
pokatat.desc: Player and club listings: sparring, partners, open tables — on the site and in Telegram.

telegram.title: Telegram bot
telegram.desc: Tournaments, match alerts, club tools, bookings, and Play a match — in @{bot}.

clubNews.title: Club news
clubNews.desc: Tournament and promo announcements — clubs publish in their profile; players see them on the home feed.

booking.title: Table booking
booking.desc: Online booking with a floor plan — players pick table and time; clubs confirm.

ctaBlock.title: Join the community
ctaBlock.lead: Register as a player or club — publish tournaments and news, reach billiards players in your city.

guide.title: Rules and tournament formats
guide.lead: Before your first tournament: game rules and interactive demo diagrams for each bracket format on the platform.
guide.formatsLead: Each format has its own page with a demo diagram and description. Only formats enabled by organizers are listed.
guide.rulesCardLead: Five table types — pyramid, pool, snooker, Chinese pool, and carom. Each section covers games and a short ruleset.
guide.bracketsCardLead: Bracket formats on the platform — with interactive demos and dedicated pages for 16, 32, and 64 players.

tournaments.leadDefault: Upcoming tournaments with open registration, live events, and finished events. Filter by region.
tournaments.leadGeo: Tournaments in {city} first, then nearby cities (up to {radius} km). Pick a status tab.
tournaments.searchEmptyDescription: Try another query or clear the search field.

upcoming.label: Upcoming
upcoming.emptyDescription: No tournaments with open registration in the selected region yet.

active.label: Live
active.emptyDescription: Nothing is running in this region — check upcoming events.

finished.label: Finished
finished.emptyDescription: The tournament archive is empty in this region for now.

clubs.leadDefault: Billiards clubs: photos, table types, prices, and upcoming tournaments.
clubs.leadGeo: Clubs in {city} first, then nearby cities (up to {radius} km).
clubs.emptyInCity: No clubs on the platform in {city} yet.

players.lead: Player rankings and profiles. Filter by country and city.

coaches.lead: Coaches with a verified profile. The rating on the card is from players who rated them as a coach (1–5).
coaches.emptyDescription: Enable “I coach” in your account to appear in the directory.

pokatat.lead: Find a sparring partner or opponent at your level. One-off or regular — post when and where you want to play.

client.emptyDescription: Be the first — post when and with whom you want to play
client.loginRequired: Only registered players can post listings.
client.verifyRequired: Confirm your profile in Telegram — then you can post listings.
client.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Wednesday sparring at my club
client.autoTranslateHint: An English translation is created automatically when you publish.

news.title: News
news.lead: Updates from billiard.guru and club announcements. Service news is nationwide; club news follows the selected region.

ideas.lead: Suggest improvements for billiard.guru. Ideas are moderated; after approval everyone can see and vote on them.

client.emptyDescription: Be the first — suggest an improvement for billiard.guru
client.loginRequired: Only registered players can suggest ideas.
client.verifyRequired: Confirm your profile in Telegram — then you can submit ideas.
client.bodyPlaceholder: Describe your idea: what to improve and why it helps the community
client.submitSuccess: Idea sent for moderation. We will notify you in Telegram after review.
client.mineEmpty: You have not suggested any ideas yet.

cabinet.pokatatLead: Listings for when and with whom you want to play — one-off or regular.
cabinet.notificationsLead: Choose what the bot sends you. All types are on by default except mandatory ones.
cabinet.notificationsNoTelegram: Telegram is not linked — notifications will not arrive until you verify your account in the bot (sign up or log in on the site).
cabinet.notificationsLocked: Cannot disable — required for secure sign-in
cabinet.aboutLead: Tell others about your game: formats, cue, favourite clubs. Shown on your
cabinet.aboutPlaceholder: e.g. pool and pyramid, Predator cue, usually play at …
cabinet.aboutSaved: Saved — visible on your public profile
cabinet.coachLead: When enabled, you appear in the
cabinet.coachToggleHint: Show my card on the coaches page
cabinet.coachBioLabel: About you (short in directory, full on your page)
cabinet.coachBioPlaceholder: Experience, disciplines, lesson format, rates, contacts…
cabinet.coachDisabled: You are no longer listed as a coach

auth-login-request.title: Sign-in confirmation
auth-login-request.description: When you sign in with your phone on /login — confirm or cancel in the bot.

tournament-nearby-announce.title: New tournament nearby
tournament-nearby-announce.description: When a tournament opens within 150 km of your city.

match-start-scheduled.title: Match scheduled
match-start-scheduled.description: When a start time is set for your match on the bracket.

tournament-registration-by-club.title: Registered for a tournament
tournament-registration-by-club.description: When a club adds you to a tournament (pending application).

tournament-registration-self.title: You registered for a tournament
tournament-registration-self.description: After you submit an application on the tournament page.

tournament-registration-confirmed.title: Tournament registration confirmed
tournament-registration-confirmed.description: When the organizer confirms your application.

tournament-registration-rejected.title: Tournament application rejected
tournament-registration-rejected.description: When the organizer rejects your application.

player-booking-confirmed.title: Booking confirmed
player-booking-confirmed.description: When the club confirms your table booking.

player-booking-rejected.title: Booking rejected
player-booking-rejected.description: When the club rejects your table request.

player-booking-cancelled.title: Booking cancelled
player-booking-cancelled.description: When the club cancels a confirmed booking.

idea-author-rejected.title: Idea rejected
idea-author-rejected.description: When your idea is rejected (with reason if provided).

idea-broadcast.title: New idea on the site
idea-broadcast.description: When a new idea is published — vote in the bot.

detail.loginToRespondSuffix: , to respond or contact the author.
detail.verifyToRespond: Confirm your profile in Telegram to respond.
detail.messagePlaceholder: Brief note: your rating, when you are free…
detail.consentRequired: Confirm consent to personal data processing

ruOnly.notice: This description is available in Russian only.

club.noUpcoming: No open or live tournaments right now.

tournament.handicapInteger: Handicap: integer rating difference only (no +1 in odd games)
tournament.pairParticipating: You are playing as a pair {team}
tournament.youAreRegistered: You are registered for this tournament
tournament.pairRegistration: Pair registration is handled by the host club. Ask the club admin to register your pair.
tournament.ratingBlocked: Your rating is {rating} — {limit}. Registration is not available.

results.emptyWithMatches: Standings will appear after matches are completed.
results.preliminary: Places are preliminary and will update as the tournament progresses.

participants.pendingList: Preliminary list: confirmed participants and pending applications ({count} awaiting confirmation).

bracket.notFormed: The bracket has not been formed yet. Check back on this page for updates.

display.placementTitle: Card footer: places and paths (winner/loser to #…)

matches.empty: Matches will appear after the bracket is formed.

tournamentRegister.hint: Your application goes to the organizer. After confirmation you will appear in the participant list.

index.title: Billiards rules
index.lead: Guide to table types and disciplines — the same categories clubs use. Pick a table, then a game.
index.tableTypesLead: Five formats clubs list when booking or creating a tournament on billiard.guru.
index.generalLead: Handicap, etiquette, and tournament regulations — independent of table type.
index.ctaLead: Find an upcoming event or create your own — table type and game are listed on each tournament card.

table.disciplinesLead: Pick a game — each page has the full ruleset, history, and discipline notes.
table.foulsNotePyramid: Different pyramid disciplines have different cue-ball pocket rules and penalties. See the discipline page and tournament card for exact rules.
table.foulsNoteDefault: Penalties and ball-in-hand depend on the tournament regulations — confirm with the referee before the match.
table.findClub: Find a club with a {table} table

game.disclaimer: This is a short guide. The exact regulations are in the tournament description on billiard.guru or from the organizer. Official event rules take precedence.

index.title: Tournament brackets
index.lead: Single elimination, Swiss, and ready-made formats for 16, 32, and 64 players — with demos and one-click tournament creation.
index.empty: Bracket formats will appear on the platform soon. For now you can
index.emptyOr: or create an event in your account.
index.platformLead: Not just a bracket image — a live tournament with registration, results, and alerts.
index.chooseLead: A quick guide — no Excel or manual drawing.
index.ctaLead: Sign up, pick a format, and invite players — the bracket and results update automatically.

landing.ctaLead: Sign up, create an event, and pick the “{format}” format. The bracket is generated automatically — you only accept entries and enter scores.

demo.structureFragment: Interactive bracket fragment (16→8): this is how match cards and winner/loser paths look. The full {count}-match diagram appears in the tournament after the bracket is formed.
demo.structureNote: Column layout and match numbers (#). In a tournament — real participants and results.
demo.sampleNote: Sample first round with fictional players. In your tournament — real participants and live results.

page.stubLead: The full text will be published on this page. You can place a file at
page.stubOr: or replace the page content in code.
page.downloadNote: — the link will work after the file is uploaded.

coachReviews.selectRating: Choose a rating from 1 to 5 stars
coachReviews.consentRequired: Confirm consent to personal data processing
coachReviews.commentPlaceholder: How did the coach help, what did you like…
coachReviews.title: Reviews
coachReviews.sectionLead: Players who trained with this coach can rate them from 1 to 5. This is not a tournament rating.
coachReviews.noRatingsYet: No one has rated this coach yet.
coachReviews.thankYou: Thank you, your review was saved.
coachReviews.cannotRateSelf: You cannot rate your own coach page.
